加密貨幣與區塊鏈 ·

以太幣想再強勁上漲？Sharplink 執行長點名美法案、風險意願與資產代幣化SharpLink Chief Maps Three Prerequisites for Ether’s Next Leg Higher

https://cointelegraph.com/news/sharplink-ceo-points-out-these-3-catalysts-for-ethereum-to-reach-new-highs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

  • SharpLink Gaming 執行長受訪表示，以太幣要重拾強勁升勢，預期須三件大事水到渠成。
  • 首項催化劑是美國數位資產市場修法（含《CLARITY》方向）進展，並帶來更清楚的合規軌道與市場想像。
  • 他提到亞洲等金融中心也正盯緊華盛頓對加密態度由敵意轉趨務實、可能重振領先地位的走向。
  • 第二項是投資人情緒回暖，並仰賴地緣張力降溫，以及過度集中的「AI」敘事熱度退燒以利資金再配置。
  • 第三項是他持續關切的實體資產代幣化趨勢若擴大，有助以太坊生態長線需求想像。

SharpLink Gaming 執行長Joseph Chalom 在同日節目中說以太幣要重振動能須三大催化齊發：美國加密監管法案推進並牽動全球觀察、市場在地緣趨緩與對 AI 熱潮降溫後重拾風險意願，以及實體資產代幣化持續擴張。

  • The CEO argues Ether needs three separate forces to align before it can realistically push meaningfully higher again.
  • The first hinge is substantive US legislative progress—notably clearer national rules resembling the CLARITY policy direction.
  • He notes major Asian financial hubs are watching closely as Washington pivots away from hostility toward workable digital‑asset regimes.
  • A second prerequisite is revived risk appetite, helped by geopolitical tensions easing and market obsession with AI themes cooling down.
  • The third driver he cites is accelerating real‑world‑asset tokenization, which could reinforce long‑haul utility narratives for Ethereum.

SharpLink Gaming’s CEO ties renewed Ether momentum mainly to clearer US crypto law, revived risk appetite, and growth in real‑world‑asset tokens.
